violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Cloths at front bar used at table tops stated as "changed out 2 times per day or when visibly dirty-current hours are 11-8. *Change every 2 hours or less or store in sanitizer solution between uses. *Facility is using Windex disinfectant at public table tops/surfaces.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Cook line cutting boards are stained, due for deep clean.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. smokers. -Smoker left dirty from use over last weekend.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Residue at underside of oven handle. -Residue at lids of bulk food in dry storage. -Residue at 2nd floor kitchen light switch.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Plastic spoons at server line are not all faced one direction to protect food contact surfaces.--Clean equipment/utensil was not placed in a self-draining position. -Ice buckets at ice machine on 2nd floor were not stored inverted.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Case of paper towels stored on floor at 3rd floor storage.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -2 sleeves of plastic cups on floor behind front bar. *COS-moved to drain board storage.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -Paper towels are jammed at cook line hand sink.

Lighting. — ---Broken light fixture in kitchen walk in freezer.--Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/ utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. -2nd floor kitchen lights are unshielded.

Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. Roast thawing on rack in the kitchen instead of under refrigeration or under cold running water.
General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Remove foil on bottom shelves in kitchen. Foil is not a durable surface.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwash was not maintained and used for other purposes. - Hand soap was not provided. - Handwash sink on the line was dirty. - Cook using handwash sink to fill spray bottle.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Walls in upstairs kitchen are dirty.
Lighting. — --Light fixtures in upstairs kitchen need to be covered or shatterproof.
Adequate, shielded, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Storage, properly handled (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Installed, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Cooking and reheating to the proper time and temperature (5 pts deducted)
